
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for HF w. bond length 1.75 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...
Built molecule HF with basis 6-31G and bond length 1.75 Angstrom.
Number of electrons: 10, Number of orbitals: 11
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 4 active virtual orbitals (out of 6 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -99.95541032822322 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.1604787112313396 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).

OVOS optimized energy = -102.58804 Hartree @ iterations 334.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...

Calculating UMP2 natural orbitals for comparison...
UMP2 natural orbitals are restricted (RHF-like).
